# spec-mock-go-sdk

> Go SDK for the Deepgram speech-to-text platform: prerecorded transcription and live streaming transcription over REST and WebSocket. Generated by the Deepgram Smithy spec pipeline (`api/` from `spec-codegen-go`; idiomatic facade in `pkg/` maintained by `spec-idiomatic`). Runs on Go 1.22+. Listen is the only product wired today; others return per-product as each migrates into the pipeline.

## Quick start

- [README.md](README.md) — install, runnable examples for both transports, auth.
- [pkg/client/listen/v1/rest/example_test.go](pkg/client/listen/v1/rest/example_test.go) — runnable REST examples per method.
- [pkg/client/listen/v1/websocket/example_test.go](pkg/client/listen/v1/websocket/example_test.go) — runnable WebSocket examples per method.

## Runnable examples (REST)

Every exported symbol has a matching `Example_*` function in [`example_test.go`](pkg/client/listen/v1/rest/example_test.go):

- `ExampleNew` — explicit credentials
- `ExampleNewWithDefaults` — env-backed credentials
- `ExampleClient_WithBaseURL` — point at a staging endpoint
- `ExampleClient_WithHTTPClient` — supply a custom `*http.Client`
- `ExampleClient_FromURL` — transcribe a remote URL
- `ExampleClient_FromFile` — transcribe a local file
- `ExampleClient_FromStream` — transcribe an `io.Reader`
- `ExamplePreRecordedTranscriptionOptions` — all 35 public query parameters

## Runnable examples (WebSocket)

Every exported symbol has a matching `Example_*` function in [`example_test.go`](pkg/client/listen/v1/websocket/example_test.go):

- `ExampleNew`, `ExampleNewWithDefaults`, `ExampleClient_WithBaseURL`
- `ExampleClient_Connect` — open a live session
- `ExampleStream_SendAudio` — push audio bytes
- `ExampleStream_Recv` — receive typed events (`ResultsEvent`, `MetadataEvent`, etc)
- `ExampleStream_Finalize`, `ExampleStream_KeepAlive`, `ExampleStream_Sync`
- `ExampleStream_CloseStream` — graceful end-of-audio
- `ExampleStream_Close` — terminate the connection
- `ExampleLiveTranscriptionOptions` — all 24 public query parameters

## Integration tests

- [pkg/client/listen/v1/rest/client_test.go](pkg/client/listen/v1/rest/client_test.go) — `httptest`-driven REST tests: auth header precedence, query-param wiring, body shape, response parsing.

## Maintainer entry points

- [REGEN.md](REGEN.md) — the spec pipeline + maintainer guide.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — repo orientation, skill index.
- [.agents/skills/](.agents/skills/) — maintainer-facing skills.

## Related repos

- [deepgram/spec](https://github.com/deepgram/spec) — Smithy IDL source of truth.
- [deepgram/spec-codegen-go](https://github.com/deepgram/spec-codegen-go) — Java SmithyBuildPlugin that emits `api/`.
- [deepgram/spec-idiomatic](https://github.com/deepgram/spec-idiomatic) — agentic facade regenerator.
- [deepgram/deepgram-go-sdk](https://github.com/deepgram/deepgram-go-sdk) — official customer-facing Go SDK this prototype is replacing.
